scripts.dev: npm --prefix ../shared run build && npm run db:init && tsx watch src/server.ts
scripts.build: npm --prefix ../shared run build && npm run content:validate && npm run db:generate && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix ../shared run build && npm run content:validate && npm run db:generate && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.api:smoke: npm --prefix ../shared run build && npm run content:validate && npm run db:generate && tsx src/smokeTest.ts
scripts.db:deploy: node scripts/withPrismaEnv.mjs prisma migrate deploy --schema prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:init: npm run db:generate && npm run db:push && tsx src/initDatabase.ts
scripts.db:migrate: node scripts/withPrismaEnv.mjs prisma migrate dev --schema prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:push: node scripts/withPrismaEnv.mjs prisma db push --schema prisma/schema.prisma
